race.comment: Keen to see the unbeaten TENNESSEE BOUND (1) again. She looked very good winning her first three starts last campaign, the highlight of those being the second-up demolition at Cranbourne. Her first-up win at Caulfield Heath was very good over 1000m, taking a sit but coming right away. Up to 1200m only suits her better and she maps beautifully with Johnstone claiming 3kg. EXTREMELY HARDYS (5) resumes off a very long spell. That's the query - not many win off a 20-month break but she's talented, sent out close to favourite in Listed company during 2024 Cup week when last seen. Market best guide. MAUNA KEA MISS (13) struggled in the market last time but the two runs prior reads well and she can improve. ILLYIVY (7) resumes with the peaks to run well on her day. PORSHA CRYSTAL (12) can sit on speed and stick on for a placing.
